events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON only, no code fences, matching schema. Need reason hazards severity controls. Scenario: inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure, active form build & bracing. ACI 347. Decision fail. Risk critical or high. Work_stage in-progress. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 60? value default 0. sound_source etc default. Findings: inadequate bracing/kickers unable to resist hydrostatic/concrete pour pressure, risk form blowout/collapse. Actions: stop work, add engineered braces/kickers/shoring per design, inspect by competent person/engineer, no pour until approved. Rationale. References ACI 347. Need valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision": "fail", "risk": "critical", "work_stage": "in-progress", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 50, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0, "rate": 0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Inadequate bracing/kickers for concrete pour pressure.", "Forms may not resist hydrostatic/lateral loads during placement.", "Risk of form blowout, collapse, or struck-by injury."], "actions": ["Stop work immediately in affected area.", "Install additional engineered bracing/kickers per design and ACI 347.", "Have a competent person or engineer inspect and approve the bracing before resuming or pouring.", "Do not proceed with concrete placement until formwork and bracing are compliant and signed off."], "rationale": "Active formwork with insufficient bracing/kickers cannot safely withstand lateral concrete pressure during a pour, creating imminent risk of form failure, collapse, and worker injury. This is a non-compliant, installed-defective condition requiring immediate correction before any concrete placement.", "references": ["ACI 347"]}
